ogTitle: Gilles Plains vs Gillman: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gilles Plains and Gillman.
heading: Gilles Plains vs Gillman — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gilles Plains, South Australia and Gillman, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gillman has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Gilles Plains (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gilles Plains or Gillman safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gilles Plains has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Gillman scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gilles Plains scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Gillman scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gilles Plains or Gillman?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gillman has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
